content.en:
The true ancestor of the Life Green Clan is not called the True Ancestor here, but the Holy Ancestor, and the Holy Ancestor is also divided into ordinary Saint Ancestor, Great Saint Ancestor and Old Ancestor, the Old Ancestor is definitely second only to the level of Dao Ancestor, and there are only a dozen Ancestors in the entire Life Green Clan, which shows that after becoming a True Ancestor, every step is very difficult.

The clansmen with the largest number of life green clans are the soldier level, the soldier level is equivalent to the true monarch in the outside world, and above the soldier level is the team level, that is, the existence of the guard team level, which is equivalent to the half-step true ancestor.

However, the Life Green Clan does not have the level of a half-step True Ancestor, and a half-step True Ancestor will become a True Ancestor in the future, but the Guardian level may not be able to become a Holy Ancestor.

This is the difference between the Guardian Rank and the Half-Step True Ancestor!

But the average half-step True Ancestor is far from being able to beat the guard level, and even some top soldiers can fight with the half-step True Ancestor.

Ye Tian also learned that the Saint Ancestor-level powerhouses of the Life Green Clan were usually asleep, or absorbing the power of the outside world to nourish this land, otherwise this land would easily crumble and be destroyed.

Because of this, the escort level often comes out to patrol to prevent anyone from the outside world from breaking into this place and destroying everything here.

Therefore, as long as Ye Tian was careful, those Holy Ancestors, Great Saint Ancestors, and Old Ancestors would not come to hunt him down.

The most important place of the Life Green Clan belongs to the Life Divine Mountain, and it is rumored that the Life Green Clan was born from the Life Divine Mountain, but even the strong people of the Guardian Guardian Level Life Green Clan are not allowed to enter the Life Divine Mountain.

It is the forbidden land of the Living Greens, and it is said to contain the great secret of the Living Greens.

Meng Jiu also didn't understand the Life Divine Mountain, and even forbade discussing this issue within the clan.

"The Mountain of Life, if you can go in......"

Ye Tian thought that if he could enter the Life Divine Mountain, maybe he would be able to truly know the big secret here.

Ye Tian didn't kill Meng Jiu, because once he did, it was very likely that the Life Green Clan would know that Meng Jiu was dead and would send someone to investigate, so the possibility of him being exposed would be much greater.

Now, Meng Jiu is trapped in the world of endless sinking illusions, and as long as he doesn't lift it, it will be difficult for Meng Jiu to wake up, so as long as he takes the seal away, he doesn't have to worry about exposure.

Soon, Ye Tian disposed of Meng Jiu and put it inside a half-way space treasure to suppress it.

Capturing Meng Jiu not only obtained specific information for Ye Tian, but also obtained six Hedao treasures.

The facts are enough to prove that the Life Green Clan is really rich, and any escort-level powerhouse has six Hedao treasures, so how rich should the Holy Ancestor, the Great Saint Ancestor, and the Old Ancestor.

"If the Merge Dao Treasure can also make the Life Green Clan Merge to become a Dao Ancestor, then the Life Green Clan will probably have already become an incomparably terrifying and powerful race!" Ye Tian sighed.

It's a pity that under the restrictions of the rules, the Merge Dao Treasure is only effective for most cultivator races, and for a group like the Life Green Clan, the Merge Dao Treasure only allows them to increase the strength of the Essence Qi and Spirit, as well as cultivate some secret techniques of the unity of the Spirit and the Spirit.

In the following days, Ye Tian hid in the world of the Life Green Clan, constantly looking for the lone escort level, sealing them one by one, and occasionally encountering some soldiers, and he didn't let them go.

Under such circumstances, Ye Tian collected a large number of Hedao treasures.

It stands to reason that leaving now is undoubtedly the safest way to go, but there are too many Hedao treasures here, and there are even deeper secrets, Ye Tian is reluctant to leave.

For example, why the Life Green Clan was able to cultivate the Harmony Treasure, and what is the origin of this place, these are all very important.

If you leave, you may not have the opportunity to explore this secret in your life.

But more and more soldiers, guards, and clansmen are missing, and the Green Clan of Life has also noticed that something is wrong.

The Life Green Clan is not stupid, so that many people of the tribe are missing and cannot be contacted.

Gradually, the Life Green Clan guessed that outsiders had entered their world, and some abyssal monsters had broken into them before, and they killed them one by one, only treating the abyssal monsters as beasts, so they didn't care much about the abyss monsters.

But this time it was different, a large number of clansmen were missing, and the situation was completely different from usual, so they didn't know what to do for a while, so they could only send more escorts to find the missing people.

For the sake of safety, each team has at least a hundred escort team level, including the leader of the escort team level.

But Ye Tian could easily detect the existence of the guard level, as long as he didn't want to show his face, it would be difficult for those guard level to find Ye Tian.

this day.

Ye Tian approached the core area of the Life Green Clan, where there were tree cities.

The so-called tree city is a city built on a giant tree, and the Life Green Clan relies heavily on wood energy, and this world has many huge sacred trees, which are even bigger than the stars, and it is completely possible to build a city on them.

In this way, they will be able to cultivate very quickly in the city.

Almost every tree city has a Holy Ancestor who has been in charge for a long time, taking turns to sleep, ensuring that each tree city has one or more awakened Holy Ancestors.

As soon as he stepped into the core area, Ye Tian's expression changed, and he was a little surprised and even incredulous, even excited.

He sensed the change in the copying talent, as if there was something faintly attracting the copying talent!

He hadn't sensed this feeling for a long time, and this was the case when he found out about the treasure that could transform the copying talent!

All along, Ye Tian wanted to continue to upgrade the copying talent, but he didn't find such a treasure.

But now, he actually sensed such a treasure!

Opportunity!

This is a real big opportunity, enough to change everything in Ye Tian.

He was able to grow to this level completely by copying his talent, but if he copied his talent and upgraded it again, what kind of concept would it be? Does it mean that he has hope of transcending the Dao Ancestor and reaching the level of the Domain Ancestor in the future?

"You have to get this treasure!"

Ye Tian secretly swore an oath.

Immediately, he followed this induction and slowly advanced in the core area of the Life Green Clan.

Finally, he determined the location of the treasure—

"The Sacred Mountain of Life!"

Ye Tian frowned.

The Life Divine Mountain is the forbidden place of the Life Green Clan, but it does not mean that the Life Green Clan does not attach importance to the Life Sacred Mountain, but it attaches great importance to it.

According to Meng Jiu's understanding, as well as the interrogation of other escort teams, there were at least hundreds of Saint Ancestor and Great Saint Ancestor around the Life God Mountain, and there was even an Old Ancestor who was awake all the time.

They have been guarding the sacred mountain of life, and no one has been able to enter it.

With such a huge force guarding the Life Divine Mountain, Ye Tian did not have any hope of entering the Life Divine Mountain at all.

"Unless ......"

Ye Tian thought of a way.

Reincarnation is born!

This Dao-level natal talent can allow him to be temporarily reincarnated into a new life, and he can also lift the innate state of reincarnation with a single thought.

This means that he can be temporarily reincarnated as a Life Green Clan, so that he can hide from the upper echelons of the Life Green Clan.

But in this way, he will become very weak, and he will need to cultivate step by step before he can grow to the guard level.

Since the True Spirit Essence still belonged to the Half-Step True Ancestor, he couldn't grow to the Saint Ancestor level of the Life Green Clan, but this was enough.

As long as he doesn't die, he can still integrate into the Green Clan of Life, and only then can he hope to enter the Mountain of Life, explore the secrets of the Mountain of Life, and get the mysterious treasure that is extremely helpful to him.

After thinking about it for a while, Ye Tian decided to use the Dao-level natal talent of reincarnation innate and blend into the Life Green Clan.
